reviewTexts: Came here with some friends before the zoo for a light breakfast and coffee and had the best coffee I’ve ever had. Service was absolutely wonderful and baked goods were delicious. Hidden gem for sure, highly highly recommend!
My friend and I were visiting from out of town and stopped here before going to the zoo. Everything was DELICIOUS and the owner was very nice! If we lived here we would definitely be regulars.

We stopped for breakfast. Quiche is phenomenal and coffee was rich and exactly what we wanted. Charming place and the locals clearly love it. We enjoyed chatting with the regulars and appreciated a good morning stop on our way to Virginia.
Coffee that is NEVER bitter. And this place is so cute.
The coffee here is so good it taught my boyfriend how to whistle (he has never been able to whistle in his life, but after a sip he let out a perfect one)

The tiramisu lattes were okay, they weren’t very sweet in my opinion. The actual piece of tiramisu cake on top of the coffee was a nice touch though. I kind of wish the cake was included on the side though, it got a little soggy in the coffee. The crepe cake was delicious and beautiful presentation!
Really great place with incredible coffee and breakfast sandwiches. I’ll definitely be stopping by again!
My favorite spot now. Banoffee is top notch

unfair_advantage.label: conversion path clarity
unfair_advantage.evidence: Every conversion-path signal present: website, phone, hours, claimed profile.
